ops.text:
E26 — probe stage only. Cap $0 (pure compute, no LLM spend). Gates Wave 2 DPO/DPOP/KTO bake-off spend.

MOTIVATION: DPO degrades when chosen responses are small edits of rejected ones (DPO-Positive, arXiv:2402.13228): the shared-prefix cancels and the gradient pushes down log p(chosen). Measure how prevalent small-edit pairs are in our preference data.

INPUT: snapshot _base-20260719/dataset/dpo/train.parquet — 470 rows, columns prompt/chosen/rejected/id/category. Each row is one preference pair; chosen & rejected are lists of assistant messages sharing the same prompt. KTO view is unpaired (label per completion), so the paired DPO view is the correct source (task: "dpo/kto views if present"). Read-only direct from snapshot (pure read, no clone needed).

PRE-REGISTERED METRIC: token-level normalized Levenshtein edit distance
  d(pair) = lev(tok(chosen), tok(rejected)) / max(|tok(chosen)|, |tok(rejected)|); d=0 if both empty.
  text(side) = "\n".join(m["content"] for m in side).
PRIMARY tokenizer: regex `\w+|[^\w\s]` (word + individual-punctuation tokens); deterministic, offline.
ROBUSTNESS tokenizers: (a) whitespace .split(), (b) character-level, (c) Qwen3-8B subword tokenizer (base model = qwen3-8b) if loadable offline.

PRE-REGISTERED THRESHOLD: DPOP small-edit risk regime = normalized distance < 0.20. small_edit_share = fraction of the 470 pairs with d < 0.20 under the PRIMARY tokenizer. Diagnostics: identical share (d==0), near-identical (d<0.05).

REPORT: histogram, quantiles {min,p5,p10,p25,p50,p75,p90,p95,max}, mean, small_edit_share + bootstrap 95% CI (10k resamples, seed 1729). Robustness = small_edit_share under all 4 tokenizers.

PRE-REGISTERED DECISION (gates Wave 2): bakeoff_warranted = (small_edit_share >= 0.30) under PRIMARY tokenizer. True -> DPO/DPOP/KTO bake-off arms warranted. False -> recommend SKIP DPOP.

SUCCESS CRITERION: emit distribution + small_edit_share w/ CI + robustness band + explicit bakeoff recommendation; raw per-pair distances saved to out/ for a verify lane.
Artifacts under ~/.cc-steer/experiments/e26-editdist/out/.
